Title: 1X3 Router Design and Verification
Description: Designed a 1x3 router that directs the packet that it receives to three different destinations which have been implemented using synthesis constraints in Verilog hardware descriptive language and verification done with testbench in Verilog. Quartus Prime used for synthesis and Modelsim for verifying simulations

Title: PeopleLink "Look At Me" Controller
Description: Spearheaded the circuit design and testing for the "Look At Me" Controller, a sophisticated camera system optimized for use in conference rooms and educational settings. Developed both wired and wireless models, focusing on intuitive control systems that enable the camera to automatically adjust and focus on active speakers. Implemented user-friendly solutions that simplified installation and operation, enhancing the product's accessibility and efficiency in collaborative environments.

Title: Raspberry Pi Applications for Assistive Technologies
Description: Engaged in the creation of reading aids for visually impaired individuals using Raspberry Pi technology, aiming to enhance accessibility and learning in educational settings.

Title: Pre-owned Cars pricing forecast using R language
Description: Developed and implemented a Random Forest Regression model in R for pre-owned car price forecasting, achieving 85.67% accuracy. Conducted data preprocessing, including handling missing values and converting categorical features, for a dataset of 48,904 rows.

Title: Image Denoising using Deep Learning
Description: Developed a deep learning framework for image denoising, specifically targeting additive white Gaussian noise (AWGN) using a dual-domain learning approach.  Implemented a composite loss function incorporating pixel-wise MSE, FFT-based spectral loss, and noise estimation regularization for enhanced spatial and frequency fidelity.  Designed a convolutional network with skip connections and frequency-aware branches, trained on various noise intensities (σ=1.5 to σ=25).  Achieved significant performance improvements, including PSNR gains exceeding 12 dB at high noise levels and a 95% reduction in residual noise under low-noise conditions.  Demonstrated robust adaptability for applications in medical imaging, satellite observation, and consumer photography, emphasizing high-fidelity reconstruction and noise reduction.

Title: GasOps MTR extraction
Description: • Clean single-file components (AI/ OCR/ API PDF orchestration XLSX/ Prompts / Config / Uploader • Azure Document Intelliaence OCR (orebuilt-document • Al mapping (supports Azure OpenAl or OpenAl;: gracefully handles missing config, • Certificate + token-based API fetch by HeatNumber (GET and metadata POST • Robust JSON extraction from model responses (scans first valid JSON block All outputs and intermediate JSON saved in output/ (keeps sampie ijson/ pristine • Debug responses persisted under debug/ for failed API calls • Backwards-compatible CLI shim retained ( cli/post _mtr_data.py ) but slated for removal • Minimal external assumptions: only .env + certificate required

Title: 🛡️ Sentinel: Autonomous DevOps Orchestrator [WIP]
Description: Sentinel is an AI-driven bridge between Jira and GitHub designed to automate the manual overhead of the DevOps lifecycle. Sentinel continuously monitors Jira boards for new tasks and autonomously handles the implementation process—taking tickets from "To Do" to "Done" with minimal human intervention.  🚀 Key Capabilities: Autonomous Polling: Automatically scans Jira boards every 30 seconds for new tickets.  AI-Powered Implementation: Leverages Azure OpenAI and GitHub Copilot to analyze repository structures and generate context-aware code fixes.  Automated PR Management: Creates feature branches, triggers Copilot for implementation, and manages the approval/merge flow once CI/CD checks pass.  Multi-Tenant Architecture: Supports per-user GitHub OAuth, ensuring actions are performed securely under individual user contexts.  MCP Integration: Includes a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server, allowing AI agents like Claude or VS Code Copilot to interact directly with the orchestration tools.  By closing the loop between project management and version control, Sentinel allows developers to focus on high-level architecture while the "plumbing" of ticket fulfillment is handled automatically.  Check out the repository here: Unigalactix/SENTINEL
